reasoning: DeepSeek is a formidable contender, but faces steep competition from US giants like OpenAI (with o3/o4), Anthropic (Claude 4.0), and Google (Gemini 2.5), who have significantly more compute resources. While DeepSeek released V3.2-Exp at the end of September 2025, maintaining or taking the #1 spot on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard exactly on December 31 requires consistently outperforming all of these rivals' latest models. Given that they were reportedly around 4th place mid-year and the rapid iteration cycle of well-resourced US competitors, the probability of DeepSeek holding the absolute top spot on December 31 is estimated at approximately 11%.
